scoring_limit: Scores prioritize the next bounded research package; they are not grammatical confidence, productivity estimates, or acceptance decisions.

candidates.reason: Multiple independent sources support postverbal 緊 and overt-object examples; the family is learner-important and architecturally isolated, but lexical compatibility, object assembly, broad-alias leakage, and prospective custody remain unresolved.

Strong packet readiness and low risk, but the progressive family has greater learner-harm and diagnostic value because current output both misses source positives and overextends into unresolved environments.
Externally mapped and structurally isolated, but lexicalized discourse forms require more native review and offer less immediate parser-wide value.
Useful aspect work, but lexical selection and event-structure boundaries are less mature than the narrow progressive overt-object profile.
